message:
style(scheduler,router): clippy lint fix and test determinism improvement

- three_lane.rs: replace cert.len() > 0 with !cert.is_empty() per clippy
  len_zero lint
- router.rs: sort selected_ids in select_n test before asserting equality,
  since LoadBalanceStrategy::Random does not guarantee a stable order when
  selecting all available endpoints (n >= available.len())

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
